message:
feat(fwc): improve schema_nav with nested validation, path-aware fill, and filter

Enhance schema_nav module: validate_input now recurses into nested
objects and arrays instead of only checking top-level properties.
fill_template uses dot-path bindings for nested field replacement.
filter_by_field uses proper path matching. Added 115 passing tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
